phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a canal boat for the day
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je louer une péniche pour la journée sur le canal ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh loo-AY yoon pay-NEESH poor lah zhoor-NAY soor luh kah-NAL
phrases.cultural_note: The Canal du Midi, a UNESCO World Heritage site built by Pierre-Paul Riquet in the 17th century, links the Atlantic to the Mediterranean.

responses.english: At Port Saint-Sauveur, near the bridge.
responses.phonetic: oh POR sahn-soh-VUR pray doo POHN
responses.french: Au port Saint-Sauveur, près du pont.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if cycling along the canal towpath is allowed
phrases.text_local: Est-il permis de faire du vélo sur le chemin de halage du canal ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL pair-MEE duh FAIR doo VAY-loh soor luh shuh-MAN duh ah-LAZH doo kah-NAL
phrases.cultural_note: The towpath (chemin de halage) along the Canal du Midi is one of France's most scenic cycling routes, shaded by centuries-old plane trees.

responses.english: Yes, the path is open to bikes.
responses.phonetic: wee lah PEEST eh too-VAIR oh VAY-loh
responses.french: Oui, la piste est ouverte aux vélos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the cruise to the first lock takes
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure la croisière jusqu'à la première écluse ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohm-BYAN duh TAHN DYOOR lah krwah-ZYAIR zhoos-KAH lah pruh-MYAIR ay-KLYOZ
phrases.cultural_note: The Canal du Midi passes through numerous locks (écluses); watching a boat navigate through is a classic canal experience.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are boat trips departing from Port Saint-Sauveur
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des excursions en bateau au départ du Port Saint-Sauveur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day ex-kyoor-SYON ahn bah-TOH oh day-PAR doo por san-soh-VUR
phrases.cultural_note: Port Saint-Sauveur is Toulouse's main canal port, offering pleasure cruises and hire boats on the Canal du Midi and the Canal de Brienne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a picnic to enjoy along the canal
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter de quoi pique-niquer le long du canal ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ash-TAY duh KWAH peek-nee-KAY luh LOHN doo kah-NAL
phrases.cultural_note: The banks of the Canal du Midi under the plane trees are a favourite Toulousain spot for a relaxed picnic lunch.

responses.english: There is a bakery on the corner.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah oon boo-lahn-zhuh-REE oh KWAHN duh lah ROO
responses.french: Il y a une boulangerie au coin de la rue.
